steps.title: Factor out the common factor
steps.content:
The equation $4x^2 - 32x - 40 = 0$ has 4 as a common factor in every term.

Factor it out: $$4(x^2 - 8x - 10) = 0$$

Divide both sides by 4: $$x^2 - 8x - 10 = 0$$

steps.title: Isolate the target expression
steps.content:
Rearrange to isolate $x^2 - 8x$:

$$x^2 - 8x = 10$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
